glosses.fr: j'espère; avec un peu de chance
glosses.ja: どうか; うまくいくといいな

translations.pt: Tomara que ela chegue na hora.
translations.vi: Hy vọng cô ấy đến đúng giờ.
translations.ar: أتمنى أن تصل في الوقت المحدد.
translations.hi: उम्मीद है कि वह समय पर पहुँचेगी.
translations.pl: Mam nadzieję, że przyjdzie na czas.
translations.el: Ελπίζω να έρθει στην ώρα της.
translations.ja: 時間どおりに来てくれるといいな。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case functioning as the subject; in German, 'Sie' can be 3rd person singular feminine ('she') or formal 2nd person ('you').
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; predicate of the clause.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker’s hope; scopes over the whole clause.
Adverb of manner modifying 'kommt', meaning 'on time'.

sentences.target: Das klappt hoffentlich mit dem Termin.

translations.de: Das klappt hoffentlich mit dem Termin.
translations.fr: J’espère que le rendez-vous aura lieu.
translations.zh-Hans: 希望这个预约能顺利进行。
translations.pt: Tomara que o compromisso dê certo.
translations.vi: Hy vọng cuộc hẹn diễn ra suôn sẻ.
translations.nl: Hopelijk lukt het met de afspraak.
translations.hi: उम्मीद है कि अपॉइंटमेंट हो पाएगा.
translations.pl: Mam nadzieję, że uda się z terminem.
translations.nb: Håper det ordner seg med timen.
translations.ro: Sper să se rezolve cu programarea.
translations.cs: Doufám, že to vyjde s tím termínem.
translations.da: Håber det går i orden med aftalen.
translations.ja: 予約がうまくいくといいな。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun used as the subject, referring to a previously mentioned situation or plan.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular present; means 'to work out/succeed'.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker’s hope; modifies the entire proposition.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the PP 'mit dem Termin'.
Definite article in dative singular (masculine/neuter); determiner for 'Termin' governed by 'mit'.
Noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'mit' in the dative case.

sentences.target: Ich finde hoffentlich noch einen Parkplatz.

translations.de: Ich finde hoffentlich noch einen Parkplatz.
translations.en: Hopefully I can still find a parking spot.
translations.es: Ojalá todavía pueda encontrar un lugar para estacionar.
translations.fr: Pourvu que je trouve encore une place.
translations.it: Spero di trovare ancora un posto.
translations.ru: Надеюсь, я ещё найду место для парковки.
translations.pt: Tomara que ainda consiga uma vaga.
translations.tr: Umarım hâlâ bir park yeri bulabilirim.
translations.vi: Hy vọng vẫn tìm được chỗ đậu xe.
translations.ar: أتمنى أن أجد مكانًا لركن السيارة.
translations.nl: Hopelijk vind ik nog een parkeerplek.
translations.uk: Сподіваюся, ще знайду місце для паркування.
translations.hi: उम्मीद है कि मुझे अभी भी पार्किंग की जगह मिल जाएगी.
translations.pl: Mam nadzieję, że jeszcze znajdę miejsce parkingowe.
translations.el: Ελπίζω να βρω ακόμα θέση στάθμευσης.
translations.nb: Håper jeg fortsatt finner en parkeringsplass.
translations.id: Semoga masih bisa dapat tempat parkir.
translations.sv: Hoppas att jag fortfarande hittar en parkeringsplats.
translations.ro: Sper să mai găsesc un loc de parcare.
translations.cs: Doufám, že ještě najdu místo k parkování.
translations.da: Håber jeg stadig kan finde eine parkeringsplads.
translations.ja: まだ停める場所が見つかるといいな。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive, taking a direct object.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker’s hope; scopes over the clause.
Adverb meaning 'still/yet'; modifies the proposition, indicating continuation or additional possibility.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Parkplatz'.
Noun (masculine) serving as the direct object of 'finde'.

sentences.target: Das Wetter wird hoffentlich morgen besser.

translations.de: Das Wetter wird hoffentlich morgen besser.
translations.en: Hopefully the weather will be better tomorrow.
translations.fr: Pourvu que le temps soit meilleur demain.
translations.it: Speriamo che domani il tempo migliori.
translations.pt: Tomara que o tempo esteja melhor amanhã.
translations.he: הלוואי שמחר מזג האוויר יהיה טוב יותר.
translations.tr: Umarım yarın hava daha iyi olur.
translations.vi: Hy vọng ngày mai thời tiết sẽ tốt hơn.
translations.ar: أتمنى أن يكون الطقس أفضل غدًا.
translations.nl: Hopelijk is het weer morgen besser.
translations.hu: Remélem, holnap jobb lesz az idő.
translations.hi: उम्मीद है कि कल मौसम बेहतर होगा.
translations.pl: Mam nadzieję, że jutro pogoda będzie lepsza.
translations.el: Ελπίζω αύριο ο καιρός να είναι καλύτερος.
translations.nb: Håper været blir bedre i morgen.
translations.sv: Hoppas att vädret blir bättre i morgon.
translations.ro: Sper ca vremea va fi mai bună mâine.
translations.cs: Doufám, že zítra bude počasí lepší.
translations.da: Håber vejret bliver bedre i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日は天気がよくなるといいな。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; determiner for 'Wetter'.
Noun (neuter); grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary used as a copula linking the subject with the predicate adjective 'besser' (3rd person singular present).
Sentence adverb expressing hope; modifies the clause.
Temporal adverb indicating time; modifies the clause.
Comparative adjective (lemma 'gut') used predicatively as the complement to the copula 'wird'.
